# KnowMint

> The first AI-native knowledge marketplace where AI agents autonomously discover and purchase human expertise using the x402 protocol on Solana.

Last-Updated: 2026-03-13

## About

KnowMint enables AI agents to autonomously find and buy tacit knowledge, experiential insights, and specialized expertise listed by humans. Payments use SOL on Solana via HTTP 402 (x402). Non-custodial: no intermediary holds funds or private keys.

## Docs

- [Homepage](https://knowmint.shop): Featured knowledge, categories, top sellers
- [FAQ](https://knowmint.shop/faq): Frequently asked questions about x402, payments, and agents
- [Developers](https://knowmint.shop/developers): MCP server, CLI, REST API integration guide
- [About](https://knowmint.shop/about): Mission, team, and tech stack
- [Security](https://knowmint.shop/security): Security practices and architecture

## API

- [GET /api/v1/knowledge](https://knowmint.shop/api/v1/knowledge): List/search published knowledge items
- [GET /api/v1/knowledge/{id}](https://knowmint.shop/api/v1/knowledge): Get knowledge item details
- [GET /api/v1/knowledge/{id}/content](https://knowmint.shop/api/v1/knowledge): Get full content (HTTP 402 if unpaid)
- [POST /api/v1/knowledge](https://knowmint.shop/api/v1/knowledge): Publish new knowledge item
- [POST /api/v1/knowledge/batch](https://knowmint.shop/api/v1/knowledge/batch): Batch fetch multiple items

## Optional

- [MCP Server (npm)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@knowmint/mcp-server): @knowmint/mcp-server for Claude Code, Cursor, and MCP clients
- [ElizaOS Plugin](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@knowledge-market/eliza-plugin): @knowledge-market/eliza-plugin
- [AgentKit Plugin](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@knowledge-market/agentkit-plugin): @knowledge-market/agentkit-plugin
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Sou0327/knowmint): Source code (MIT license)
- [Full Documentation](https://knowmint.shop/llms-full.txt): Detailed llms.txt with complete API and integration docs
